name: file-uploader-desktop
description: Electron desktop host that bundles file-uploader-server (NestJS) and file-uploader-fe (Vue 3) into a single installable app
author: 杨

scripts.dist:win: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config.win.target=portable
scripts.dist:win-installer: npm run build && cross-env CSC_IDENTITY_AUTO_DISCOVERY=false electron-builder --win --config.win.target=nsis
